title: lamium garganicum var. longiflorum
intro: Lamium garganicum var. longiflorum, also known as Garganica or Long-flowered Deadnettle, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lamium garganicum var. longiflorum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized for therapeutic purposes.
